name: Venus
description:
STAR DROID SCRAMBLE 3/10

Art by: marinostyle on DeviantArt

"What are you bubbling over and about?"

Welcome Venus, the third Star Droid in the conga line! A bubbly fella who does have a chance of blowing you up should you look at him the wrong way or mistake his gender. And yes, Venus is a he, not a she - still boggles my mind as to how that is possible.

Anyways, this one is VERY aggressive. He will not hesitate pulling the trigger unless you manage to get to him. But god have mercy if you say he is a girl... Then you're pretty much fucked. Not literally, but I mean... you're dead. So tread carefully and don't let his derpy appearance fool you.

Next week, choose between one of the remaining six for a befriending:

  • Mercury

  • Terra

  • Mars

  • Saturn

  • Uranus

  • Neptune

Previous entries:

Entry 1 - Jupiter

Entry 2 - Pluto
creator: Junk_Arms
